name: decodo-openclaw-skill
description: OpenClaw skill for scraping any URL using the Decodo Web Scraping API. Solid integration with good documentation. Requires an external Decodo API subscription.
review: Solid web scraping skill using the Decodo API with good integration. Requires an external Decodo API subscription for use. Good documentation and clean implementation. Gamora score: 7.1/10.
catalog_notes: README states MIT. Formal LICENSE file pending.
